title: Benjia 40th Birthday Greeting Cards for Men Women, Born in 1986 UK Vintage Bday Card with Envelope, 40 Years Old Funny Birthdays Gift Card for Him Her Birthday Decoration Party Supply, 20x25 cm
features: 【Retro & Fun Design】Celebrate with this Happy 40th Birthday Card, featuring a charming vintage look that perfectly captures the nostalgic vibe of 1986 for a fun and memorable party decoration

【High-Quality Materials】This 40th birthday greeting card measures 20x25 cm, comes with an high quality large envelope and 4 retro vibe stickers, allowing plenty of space inside for guests to write personalized birthday wishes. Made from premium 300gsm paper and color printing single-sided lamination, it ensures durability and elegance

【Historical 1986 Facts】The front of the funny birthday greeting card includes key highlights from 1986, such as prices, music, movies, and popular trends, making it a thoughtful and meaningful vintage born in 1986 birthday theme party gift

【Versatile Use】Not just a greeting card, it also serves as a 40 years old birthday themed party decoration, a photo prop, a poster, adding a nostalgic vibe to 40th birthday celebrations, perfect for family gatherings, friend parties, or office events

【Perfect for Milestone Celebration】Ideal for 40th birthday parties, this 40th birthday gift card is perfect for men, women, dad, mom, husband, wife, uncle, aunt, son, daughter - anyone born in 1986 who appreciates nostalgia and want a unique, themed birthday experience
